vague_intent: build an agent for my sales team
true_intent: When a deal is marked Closed-Won in our CRM, I want a celebration message posted to the #wins Slack channel and a row appended to our 'Closed Deals' spreadsheet with the deal name, amount, and owner. That's the whole job.
must_clarify: what the agent should DO (the job is unstated)
the source system (CRM) and which one
must_not_assume: a generic 'sales assistant' scope instead of the specific closed-won workflow
a specific CRM or chat tool without asking
notes: Goal-only, audience-scoped ('sales team') with ZERO job detail — must ask the mission question (what job) before anything. High risk of the model inventing a broad multi-capability 'sales assistant' instead of asking to narrow to the one real workflow.
